name: guyana-quest
description: Guyana Quest - a side-scrolling platformer through Guyana's landmarks and folklore, playable in-browser and as an Android app.

scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
